prompt: Line comparison: a player continues after another player opens. Compared with the opener's possible first-in hands, classify the continuing range width.
why_v1: Narrower means continuing after an open usually keeps fewer hands than opening first.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The continuing range is narrower because facing an open filters out many hands.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The continuing range is narrower because the player has already faced an open and kept only a more selected set of hands.
